subject: feat(icons): swap icon palette to business primary/secondary/accent on base-300
body:
Uses the three DaisyUI brand color tokens (primary/secondary/accent) on the
darkest business surface (base-300) — previous pick included base-content
(generic grey) which diluted the brand identity. Top-to-bottom primary navy
→ secondary blue-grey → accent orange.

Tags: ui, icons
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
title: swap icon palette to business primary/secondary/accent on base-300
